newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The defining catalyst was the early-May Q1 print plus >$250M in multi-customer ion-beam/MOCVD/wet-etch orders for InP laser/silicon-photonics capacity (deliveries 2026 accelerating 2027) with FY2026 guidance reaffirmed ($740-800M rev). The +11.6% move since June 9 is sector momentum, not fresh fundamentals.

sources.label: Veeco $250M+ AI datacom laser tool orders

verdicts.rankRationale: CPO lens: the May >$250M InP-laser/silicon-photonics deposition order book directly eases the optical-interconnect capacity bottleneck feeding co-packaged optics, supporting a top-3 picks-and-shovels rank. No new June catalyst, so only a modest +1 to reflect order-book durability.
verdicts.bull: Dominant ion-beam/MOCVD tools for InP laser capacity; >$250M booked orders ramp into 2027 as hyperscalers shift to optical interconnects.
verdicts.neutral: Strong CPO-adjacent franchise but order book already disclosed; needs follow-on bookings to re-rate further.
verdicts.bear: Tool-cycle cyclicality and customer concentration; +145% YTD already prices much of the upside.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Follow-on InP/silicon-photonics tool orders into 2027 deliveries
